title: Evidence Docket 6.1 — Chronicle Gate Lab v80
objective: Demonstrate that only validated ProofBundles can enter Chronicle memory or influence future missions.

claims.claim: The interface blocks Chronicle promotion when replay is missing.
The interface admits a Chronicle candidate when replay and validator verdict pass.

public_private_boundary: Public-safe demo only; private intelligence and customer data must remain off-chain/private.
claim_boundary: No achieved AGI/ASI, SOTA, certification, ROI, production authority, wallet, transaction, or live-settlement claim.
